title: DevOps Engineer (Trainee) | 2024 – 2025
details: Automated OS setup and database provisioning using Ansible, reducing manual configuration time (MySQL, mongo DB binary installation).
Implemented CIS benchmarks for Apache 2.4, enhancing system security posture through automated configuration auditing and privilege refinement.
Experience with clustered systems (PCS Clusters), worked with web servers hosted on clustered systems to ensure high availability.

Designed and deployed a comprehensive monitoring stack using Prometheus, Grafana, and Alert Manager; configured custom SNMP exporters and node exporters to provide real-time visibility into service health and resource utilization.
Optimized a complex internal shell-based framework for automated file housekeeping and log rotation, significantly improving system disk space management and auditing efficiency.
Working in Agile environment, daily standups, SDLC.
Experience in Git environments, Linux filesystems/tools, networking concepts/diagrams, network hardening methodologies, OS hardening methodologies.

title: Freelance Engineer | 2022 - Present
company: Outsourced Projects (Fiverr, Upwork and Direct Clients)
details: Containerized and orchestrated React/Node.js microservices using Docker, Docker Compose, and K3s.
Engineered ML pipelines, deploying predictive models as scalable RESTful APIs for backend processing.
Delivered end-to-end full-stack applications (React, MySQL) utilizing both 3-tier and monolithic architectures.
Navigated tight deadlines and rapidly changing requirements, ensuring on-time delivery and high client satisfaction.
